name.en-US: On the Motion of the Heart

description.en-US: A short physical treatise written for Master Philip de Castro Caeli on the cause of the heart's motion — whether it is natural, animal, or violent.
description.la: Tractatus brevis physicus Philippo de Castro Caeli scriptus, de causa motus cordis.

sources.description: English translation by Vincent R. Larkin. Mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
